Park Avenue Jazz are a Skipton-based jazz band playing a laid-back mix of standards and Latin jazz. They have a lovely repertoire of well-known pieces and new favourites, including Fly me to the Moon, All of Me, Blue Bossa, Black Orpheus, Summertime, In a Sentimental Mood, Wonderful World and many, many more.  They are a four-piece band: saxophone, guitar, bass and drums. Chilled, laid-back and quietly awesome. 
Part of the Bingley Bandstands Concert programme for 2026 put together by the Friends of Myrtle Park, Bingley Town Council, Bradford Parks, and Bingley Music Town.
